commands.name: tool_paths
commands.command: su - opentenbase -c 'command -v opentenbase_ctl || true; command -v pgxc_ctl || true; command -v psql || true'

commands.name: find_configs
commands.command: su - opentenbase -c 'find /data/opentenbase /opt /home/opentenbase -maxdepth 5 \( -name opentenbase_config.ini -o -name config.ini -o -name pgxc_ctl.conf \) -type f 2>/dev/null | sort'

Show instance status
Usage: opentenbase_ctl status [OPTIONS]

Options:

  -c,--config TEXT            Path to configuration file
  -n,--node TEXT              Node to  show status. A certain type of node, Or a certain node. The available options are: cn-master, cn-slave, dn-master, dn-slave, cn0001, ip:port
